mapper.select: SELECT e.exchange_id, e.tenant_id, e.old_contract_id, e.old_house_id, e.old_house_code, e.new_house_id, e.new_house_code, e.exchange_reason, e.apply_time, e.approve_result, e.approve_opinion, e.approve_by, e.approve_time, e.exchange_time, e.new_contract_id, e.status, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark, e.del_flag, ct.contract_no AS contractNo, ct.tenant_name AS tenantName, ct.tenant_id_card AS tenantIdCard, ct.tenant_phone AS tenantPhone, ct.house_address AS roomAddress, ct.rent_price AS oldRent FROM hz_house_exchange e LEFT JOIN hz_contract ct ON e.old_contract_id = ct.contract_id WHERE e.exchange_id = #{exchangeId} AND e.del_flag = '0'

SELECT e.exchange_id, e.tenant_id, e.old_contract_id, e.old_house_id, e.old_house_code, e.new_house_id, e.new_house_code, e.exchange_reason, e.apply_time, e.approve_result, e.approve_opinion, e.approve_by, e.approve_time, e.exchange_time, e.new_contract_id, e.status, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark, e.del_flag, ct.contract_no AS contractNo, ct.tenant_name AS tenantName, ct.tenant_id_card AS tenantIdCard, ct.tenant_phone AS tenantPhone, ct.house_address AS roomAddress, ct.rent_price AS oldRent, ct.start_date AS contractStartDate, ct.end_date AS contractEndDate, -- 原房源完整地址 CONCAT(old_p.project_name, old_b.building_name, old_u.unit_name, old_h.house_no, '室') AS oldFullAddress, -- 目标房源完整地址 CONCAT(new_p.project_name, new_b.building_name, new_u.unit_name, new_h.house_no, '室') AS newFullAddress FROM hz_house_exchange e LEFT JOIN hz_contract ct ON e.old_contract_id = ct.contract_id LEFT JOIN hz_house old_h ON e.old_house_id = old_h.house_id LEFT JOIN hz_project old_p ON old_h.project_id = old_p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_building old_b ON old_h.building_id = old_b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit old_u ON old_h.unit_id = old_u.unit_id LEFT JOIN hz_house new_h ON e.new_house_id = new_h.house_id LEFT JOIN hz_project new_p ON new_h.project_id = new_p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_building new_b ON new_h.building_id = new_b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit new_u ON new_h.unit_id = new_u.unit_id WHERE e.del_flag = '0' AND e.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND e.status = #{status} AND e.approve_result = #{approveResult} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.exchange_id, e.tenant_id, e.old_contract_id, e.old_house_id, e.old_house_code, e.new_house_id, e.new_house_code, e.exchange_reason, e.apply_time, e.approve_result, e.approve_opinion, e.approve_by, e.approve_time, e.exchange_time, e.new_contract_id, e.status, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark, e.del_flag, ct.contract_no AS contractNo, ct.tenant_name AS tenantName, ct.tenant_id_card AS tenantIdCard, ct.tenant_phone AS tenantPhone, ct.house_address AS roomAddress, ct.rent_price AS oldRent, ct.start_date AS contractStartDate, ct.end_date AS contractEndDate, -- 原房源完整地址 CONCAT(old_p.project_name, old_b.building_name, old_u.unit_name, old_h.house_no, '室') AS oldFullAddress, -- 目标房源完整地址 CONCAT(new_p.project_name, new_b.building_name, new_u.unit_name, new_h.house_no, '室') AS newFullAddress FROM hz_house_exchange e LEFT JOIN hz_contract ct ON e.old_contract_id = ct.contract_id LEFT JOIN hz_house old_h ON e.old_house_id = old_h.house_id LEFT JOIN hz_project old_p ON old_h.project_id = old_p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_building old_b ON old_h.building_id = old_b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit old_u ON old_h.unit_id = old_u.unit_id LEFT JOIN hz_house new_h ON e.new_house_id = new_h.house_id LEFT JOIN hz_project new_p ON new_h.project_id = new_p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_building new_b ON new_h.building_id = new_b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit new_u ON new_h.unit_id = new_u.unit_id WHERE e.del_flag = '0' AND e.tenant_id = #{exchange.tenantId} AND e.status = #{exchange.status} AND e.approve_result = #{exchange.approveResult} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.*, ct.contract_no AS contractNo, ct.tenant_name AS tenantName, ct.tenant_id_card AS tenantIdCard, ct.tenant_phone AS tenantPhone, ct.start_date AS contractStartDate, ct.end_date AS contractEndDate, -- 原房源信息 old_p.project_id AS oldProjectId, old_p.project_name AS oldProjectName, old_b.building_id AS oldBuildingId, old_b.building_name AS oldBuildingName, old_u.unit_id AS oldUnitId, old_u.unit_name AS oldUnitName, old_h.house_no AS oldHouseNo, CONCAT(old_p.project_name, old_b.building_name, old_u.unit_name, old_h.house_no, '室') AS oldFullAddress, -- 目标房源信息 new_p.project_id AS newProjectId, new_p.project_name AS newProjectName, new_b.building_id AS newBuildingId, new_b.building_name AS newBuildingName, new_u.unit_id AS newUnitId, new_u.unit_name AS newUnitName, new_h.house_no AS newHouseNo, CONCAT(new_p.project_name, new_b.building_name, new_u.unit_name, new_h.house_no, '室') AS newFullAddress FROM hz_house_exchange e LEFT JOIN hz_contract ct ON e.old_contract_id = ct.contract_id LEFT JOIN hz_house old_h ON e.old_house_id = old_h.house_id LEFT JOIN hz_project old_p ON old_h.project_id = old_p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_building old_b ON old_h.building_id = old_b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit old_u ON old_h.unit_id = old_u.unit_id LEFT JOIN hz_house new_h ON e.new_house_id = new_h.house_id LEFT JOIN hz_project new_p ON new_h.project_id = new_p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_building new_b ON new_h.building_id = new_b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit new_u ON new_h.unit_id = new_u.unit_id WHERE e.exchange_id = #{exchangeId} AND e.del_flag = '0'

SELECT building_id AS buildingId, building_name AS buildingName, building_code AS buildingCode FROM hz_building WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '0' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, building_id ASC
SELECT unit_id AS unitId, unit_name AS unitName, unit_code AS unitCode FROM hz_unit WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '0' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, unit_id ASC

SELECT h.house_id AS houseId, h.house_code AS houseCode, h.house_no AS houseNo, h.floor AS floor, h.house_type_name AS houseTypeName, h.area AS area, h.rent_price AS rentPrice, p.project_name AS projectName, b.building_name AS buildingName, u.unit_name AS unitName FROM hz_house h LEFT JOIN hz_project p ON h.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN hz_building b ON h.building_id = b.building_id LEFT JOIN hz_unit u ON h.unit_id = u.unit_id WHERE h.project_id = #{projectId} AND h.building_id = #{buildingId} AND (#{unitId} IS NULL OR h.unit_id = #{unitId}) AND h.house_status = '0' AND h.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY h.floor ASC, h.house_no ASC
